word: G985 - βλαστάνω - blastánō - blas-tan'-o - Bring forth

sections.paragraph:
- Original: βλαστάνω

- Transliteration: Blastano

- Phonetic: blas-tan'-o

- Definition:

1. to sprout, bud, put forth new leaves

2. to produce

- Origin: from blastos (a sprout)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From βλαστός blastos (a sprout); to germinate; by implication to yield fruit: - bring forth bud spring (up).
